headline: Super vs Siri — personal AI agents for real computer work

site_brief.goal: Create a fair but persuasive competitor comparison page for Super vs Siri. Use supplied sources for current facts, avoid fake claims, and make the practical argument that Super is better suited for repeated computer-use work because its cache can lower repeated execution cost.
site_brief.title: Super vs Siri

summary: Siri AI is becoming a powerful, privacy‑first system assistant inside Apple devices. Super is built for a different job: persistent personal AI agents that actually operate computers and reuse a computer-use cache so repeated workflows get faster and cheaper over time. This page fairly compares what Siri excels at today — and where Super is the sharper alternative for durable computer‑use automation.
